glosses.ja: 雇う; 忙しくさせる

sentences.target: Ich will mich mit dem Garten beschäftigen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl mɪç mɪt deːm ˈɡaʁtən bəˈʃɛftɪɡən./

translations.de: Ich will mich mit dem Garten beschäftigen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl mɪç mɪt deːm ˈɡaʁtən bəˈʃɛftɪɡən./
translations.en: I want to work on the garden.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn chăm sóc khu vườn.
translations.nl: Ik wil in de tuin werken.
translations.hi: मुझे बगीचे की देखभाल करनी है।
translations.el: Θέλω να ασχοληθώ με τον κήπο.
translations.ro: Vreau să mă ocup de grădină.
translations.ja: 庭の手入れをしたいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (1st person singular, nominative).
Modal auxiliary (1st person singular, present indicative) selecting an infinitive verb.
Reflexive usage: accusative 1st person singular pronoun coreferent with the subject in the construction 'sich beschäftigen (mit + Dat)'.
Preposition governing the dative; part of the fixed pattern 'sich beschäftigen mit + Dat'.
Definite article, dative singular masculine (here with 'Garten').
Noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'mit' in the dative.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement to the modal 'will' in a reflexive construction with 'mich' and the PP 'mit dem Garten'.

sentences.target: Das Thema scheint mich zu beschäftigen.

translations.de: Das Thema scheint mich zu beschäftigen.
translations.en: The topic seems to be on my mind.
translations.es: Parece que no dejo de pensar en el tema.
translations.fr: Ce sujet semble me trotter dans la tête.
translations.it: Sembra che questo argomento non mi esca dalla testa.
translations.ko: 그 주제가 머릿속을 떠나지 않는 것 같아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个话题好像总在我脑海里转。
translations.yue: 呢個話題好似成日喺我腦海度轉嚟轉去。
translations.ru: Кажется, эта тема не выходит у меня из головы.
translations.pt: Parece que esse assunto não sai da minha cabeça.
translations.he: נראה שהנושא לא יוצא לי מהראש.
translations.vi: Có vẻ như chủ đề này cứ luẩn quẩn trong đầu tôi.
translations.ar: يبدو أن هذا الموضوع لا يخرج من بالي.
translations.nl: Het onderwerp lijkt in mijn hoofd te blijven hangen.
translations.uk: Здається, ця тема не виходить у мене з голови.
translations.hu: Úgy tűnik, ez a téma nem megy ki a fejemből.
translations.hi: लगता है यह विषय मेरे दिमाग से निकल ही नहीं रहा।
translations.pl: Wydaje się, że ten temat nie wychodzi mi z głowy.
translations.el: Φαίνεται πως αυτό το θέμα δεν μου βγαίνει από το μυαλό.
translations.nb: Det virker som om dette temaet ikke går ut av hodet mitt.
translations.id: Sepertinya topik ini terus terngiang di kepala saya.
translations.sv: Det känns som att ämnet inte lämnar mina tankar.
translations.ro: Se pare că subiectul ăsta nu-mi iese din cap.
translations.cs: Zdá se, že tohle téma mi nejde z hlavy.
translations.da: Det virker, som om emnet ikke går ud af mit hoved.
translations.fi: Tuntuu, että tämä aihe ei lähde päästäni.
translations.ja: この話題が頭から離れない気がします。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular neuter; determiner of 'Thema'.
Subject noun (nominative singular, neuter).
Main verb (3rd person singular, present); raising-like verb selecting a 'zu' + infinitive clause.
Accusative 1st person singular pronoun; direct object of the embedded infinitive 'beschäftigen' (non-reflexive use).
Infinitival particle marking the verb 'beschäftigen'.
Infinitive lexical verb inside the 'zu'-clause; transitive, taking 'mich' as direct object.

sentences.target: Die Firma will zehn Leute beschäftigen.

translations.de: Die Firma will zehn Leute beschäftigen.
translations.en: The company wants to employ ten people.
translations.es: La empresa quiere contratar a diez personas.
translations.pt: A empresa quer contratar dez pessoas.
translations.tr: Şirket on kişi işe almak istiyor.
translations.vi: Công ty muốn tuyển mười người.
translations.nl: Het bedrijf wil tien mensen aannemen.
translations.hu: A cég tíz embert akar felvenni.
translations.hi: कंपनी दस लोगों को नियुक्त करना चाहती है।
translations.el: Η εταιρεία θέλει να προσλάβει δέκα άτομα.
translations.ro: Compania vrea să angajeze zece persoane.
translations.ja: その会社は10人を採用したい。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determiner of 'Firma'.
Subject noun (nominative singular, feminine).
Modal auxiliary (3rd person singular, present) selecting an infinitive verb; expresses intention.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'Leute' (quantifier).
Plural noun; direct object (accusative plural) of 'beschäftigen'.
Infinitive lexical verb complement to the modal 'will'; here in the sense of employing/keeping people busy.

sentences.target: Er versucht, die Kinder zu beschäftigen.

translations.de: Er versucht, die Kinder zu beschäftigen.
translations.en: He is trying to keep the kids busy.
translations.es: Está intentando mantener a los niños ocupados.
translations.it: Sta cercando di tenere occupati i bambini.
translations.ko: 아이들이 심심하지 않게 하려고 애쓰고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在想办法让孩子们有事可做。
translations.yue: 佢喺度諗辦法等啲細路有嘢做。
translations.pt: Ele está tentando manter as crianças ocupadas.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang cố giữ cho bọn trẻ bận rộn.
translations.nl: Hij probeert de kinderen bezig te houden.
translations.hi: वह बच्चों को व्यस्त रखने की कोशिश कर रहा है।
translations.nb: Han prøver å holde barna opptatt.
translations.id: Dia berusaha membuat anak-anak tetap sibuk.
translations.ro: Încearcă să îi țină ocupați pe copii.
translations.da: Han prøver at holde børnene beskæftiget.
translations.ja: 子どもたちを退屈しないようにしようとしている。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person singular, nominative).
Main verb (3rd person singular, present); takes a 'zu'-infinitive complement.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner of 'Kinder'.
Plural noun; direct object of the embedded infinitive 'beschäftigen'.
Infinitival particle marking the verb 'beschäftigen'.
Infinitive lexical verb inside the 'zu'-clause; transitive, taking 'die Kinder' as direct object.

The topic seems to be on my mind.
The company wants to employ ten people.
He is trying to keep the kids busy.
